dev_repo_maintenance_commands: git switch main || git checkout main
git clean -ndx  # preview: remove build/venv/node_modules caches
git clean -fdx  # DANGER: actually delete untracked + ignored files
branch_hygiene: git switch -c fix/  # from updated main
git rebase -i origin/main  # keep history clean before PR
cleanup_stale_branches: git branch -vv | awk '/: gone]/{print $1}' | xargs -r git branch -D
safety_notes: Run 'git clean -ndx' before 'git clean -fdx' (it deletes node_modules/.venv/dist/etc).
Use 'git pull --ff-only' to avoid accidental merge commits.
Rebase feature branches onto origin/main before opening PR; keep PRs small and focused.
Always keep required checks green; fix reds before pushing more changes.
